title: STABILA Spirit Level Set 196-2 Dark Shadow 183cm | 40cm
features: DELUXE: Spirit Level Set 196-2 Dark Shadow – Special models in elegant anthracite matte coating in the practical lengths 183 cm and 40 cm at a special price
FULLY EQUIPPED: Handle openings for secure grip. Two vertical vials for quick and precise reading in any position (183 cm). A horizontal spirit level. 2 coated measuring surfaces
OPTIMALLY READABLE: Quality spirit levels with fluorescent liquid. Highly transparent, robust acrylic glass with precisely ground inner contours and flush reading rings

LONG-LASTING HIGH PRECISION MEASURING: Locked Vials installation technology ensures long-term precision. Measuring accuracy in normal position and in reversal position ± 0.5 mm/m. Accurate reading from -20°C to +50°C

PRACTICAL: Shock absorbing 2K end caps to protect the profile. Integrated slip stoppers for a secure fit of the spirit level when marking. Removable end caps for precise placement right down to corners
breadCrumbs: DIY & Tools > Power, Garden & Hand Tools > Measuring & Layout Tools > Levels > Spirit Levels
